message: Jake
Jennifer
I hesitated to knock on the door, worried about her attitude during the party.
It's strange to hesitate after coming this far.
I know, right! But, but it's just no good!
I could hear her voice coming from within. Is someone there?
Enough　already!
Stop it!! No!
In a moment,
I thought someone was assaulting her.
I knocked hard on the door, trying to stop whoever was doing that.
Bang bang bang!
The loud noise stopped, and after a moment, she opened the door.
Oh?
It was you. That was quite a loud knock.
Inside the room was only
her presence.
I thought there was someone else.
Oh, why's that?
Because I could hear your yelling all the way down the hall.
Huh, oh?
Oh no, that's right. I got into a bit of an argument on the phone.
I'm embarrassed.
Come in, you've been visiting quite often lately.
Look
Talk
Listen
Think
Move
System
The surroundings
Work matters
About Meryl
About Tony
About Director Fabar
About...
About Tony
About Director Fabar
To another place.
Save
Exit the game.
With me.
Except for me, no one is here. It seems like customers rarely come.
A bland hotel room.
There's nothing to show any personality.
Through the open door, a bedroom is visible. The bed looks like it's a single size.
There's an unusual, irritated atmosphere. Her disheveled hair hangs down from her shoulders to her chest.
I wonder what's wrong, she looks really upset.
Did I do something?
Maybe it's because of the unexpected visit; she's only wearing a shirt in a casual outfit.
Got something to say?
No, not really.
It's not anything worth mentioning.
I see.
I don’t know how to put this but...
What?
About that time at the party.
There was a reason for that.
What kind of reason?
I can't tell you right now.
Sorry, I seem to be tired today.
You know I'm free now, right? Or are you trying to get at me?
That’s not what I meant.
There's something off about you.
Shut up. I can't get any work with you bringing me down. Are you happy now?
What's wrong?
Just stop it already! Just leave me alone.
It doesn't matter, does it? It's none of your business.
Meryl was
pitiful, wasn’t she? To end up like that.
I never thought he'd go after Guy.
He must have been really hurt to lose Cindy like that.
Is that really all there is to it?
All there is? What do you mean, what else could there be?
That's a prickly way to put it, but she's washed up.
Washed up? Is that code for not popular?
She's not exactly some standout character actor or anything, and her beauty was her selling point.
So, getting older means losing your beauty, huh?
There are people who can survive a scandal, you know. There's a chance she could bounce back.
That's intriguing.
For Meryl, she might have missed a once-in-a-lifetime chance.
I haven't even spoken to Tony at the party. Can we not talk about that jerk anymore?
Sorry, I won't mention him again.
Well, that would be nice.
I didn't realize you hated him that much.
It's not that I hate him.
Let's just stop.
I said I wouldn't say it again!
Oh, I'm sorry.
I got a bit carried away.
I told you the kind of things that guy said to me, right?
Yeah, it's no wonder you dislike Tony.
Then just don't ask me anymore!
Don't bring him up, I don’t want to think about Tony.
I think he's a nice guy. But that's not everything.
What about that?
You're definitely misunderstanding. You don't trust me, do you?
Me, me.
It's sad to see you with that attitude.
That's my line! It's kind of strange.
I'm normal. There's nothing strange about me.
No one believes me, huh?
You too?
I'm frustrated.
That's the first time I've seen you like this. You used to be the type who didn't show emotions.
Who in the world were you arguing with? That wasn't normal at all. What happened?
The attitude at the party was definitely not normal. What are you hiding from me?
Tonny seems to be quite disliked.
I wonder if there's some grudge.
Do you still have something to hide from me? He's the kind of guy who would kick up a lot of dirt if you dug a little.
You never know when he'll disappear. It seems better to ask questions sooner rather than later.
The cancellation of the shoot must be a huge blow for the director. What will they do now?
You must already know about Meryl and Cindy. If he's her lover, he should at least say something nice to her.
He's not a bad person, but he's not as good as he looks. Who knows what he's done in the past?
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
